---
title: "seewandel Klima"
lang: de
categories: [project, GACR]
image: "images/seewandel_logo.png"
about:
 id: heading
 template: jolla
 image-shape: round
 image-width: 250px
listing:
  - id: blogs
    max-description-length: 500
    fields: [title, description]
    contents: "blog"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: true
---

::: {.lang-switch}
🌐 [English](index.qmd) · [Italiano](index.it.qmd) · [Español](index.es.qmd) · [Português](index.pt.qmd) · [Français](index.fr.qmd) · **Deutsch**
:::
